name: Masonry Layout Intent
summary: A primitive layout region-role (#1680 taxonomy): composition-intent = shortest-column packing of varied-height items. Identity is the arrangement, not the CSS — FUI ships one block per role and the mechanism (CSS grid masonry (grid-template-rows: masonry) or CSS multi-column) is an impl seam. Project-less; per-project styling rides presentational variants + plateau assembler presets.

column-width.description: The target column inline-size that drives the column count (more space → more columns) — the responsive knob.

gap.description: Even spacing between items and columns, on a spacing scale.

order.description: Whether items pack preserving DOM order column-wise or fill row-wise. Default column (shortest-column-first).

description:
What This Is

Packs items of varying heights into columns by always placing the next item in the shortest column, eliminating the ragged gaps of a fixed grid — Pinterest-style galleries, image boards, varied-height card walls.

Composition-intent (the identity)

A primitive layout region-role (layoutTier: region-role), one of the per-role taxonomy ratified in #1680. Its identity is the composition-intent — shortest-column packing of varied-height items — impl-agnostic. FUI ships exactly one block for this role; the CSS mechanism (CSS grid masonry (grid-template-rows: masonry) or CSS multi-column) is an impl seam, never the role's identity (platform-decisions.md#layout-role-composition-intent).

Dimensions (UX-only)

  • column-width: The target column inline-size that drives the column count (more space → more columns) — the responsive knob.
  • gap: Even spacing between items and columns, on a spacing scale (none · xs · sm · md · lg · xl).
  • order: Whether items pack preserving DOM order column-wise or fill row-wise. Default column (shortest-column-first) (column · row).

Annotation, not identity

Stays DISTINCT from grid — the #1680 load-bearing example: it must not merge into grid when CSS masonry ships, because shortest-column packing is a different composition-intent from uniform cells.
